name: Upholstered Storage Ottoman Natural/Brown - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Create a comfy arrangement for resting your feet with this Upholstered Storage Ottoman from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Featuring a wooden frame, this upholstered ottoman in natural hues is paired with wooden legs and foam padding for a standout look. Plus, the hinged lid offers additional storage in your home.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
